top_signals.title: Ukrainian Drones Hit 20 Russian Vessels in Black Sea
top_signals.summary: Ukrainian drones struck 20 Russian vessels in the Black Sea overnight, including 17 oil tankers, the commander of Kyiv's drone forces said on Wednesday.On Telegram, Robert Brovdi said the targets included two gas tankers and a tugboat.(Reuters - Reporting by Anna Pruchnicka; Editing by Thomas Derpin
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: New York becomes first U.S. state to impose AI data center ban
top_signals.summary: New York became the first state to ban construction of 'hyperscale' AI data centers, for one year, after Gov. Kathy Hochul signed an executive order Tuesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: AI startup boss warns UK cannot become ‘dependent’ on overseas tech
top_signals.summary: UK AI infrastructure company Valarian has raised $50m (£37m) in fresh funding as its boss said countries should focus on controlling AI infrastructure rather than competing to build their own frontier models. The Series A round, led by Silicon Valley investor New Enterprise Associates (NEA), takes the London firm’s total funding to $70m and marks [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Could Geothermal Energy Rescue Germany's Fading Coal Towns?
top_signals.summary: Europe’s largest economy is walking a precarious tightrope toward carbon neutrality, trying to balance energy security with climate goals as this summer’s heat waves create mounting pressure on the continent’s energy grids while simultaneously highlighting the importance of mitigating emissions. The German government aims to source 100 percent of the national energy mix from renewables by 2035, but has hedged some of its energy-transition rhetoric in recent months against the backdrop of major energy market volatility. Germany…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ethereum Foundation privacy team spins out as for-profit EthSystems to serve institutions with Lubin, Bitmine backing
top_signals.summary: The startup will build tech and provide consulting to help institutions operate on Ethereum while maintaining confidentiality.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Elevate Uranium buys Marenica stake to build Erongo scale
top_signals.summary: The deal is to lift Elevate’s Namibian resource base to 124 million lb. and its global total to 181 million pounds.
